name: Quartakk
description: Annihilate targets with four simultaneous shots from this high-caliber Grineer rifle.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Annihilate targets with four simultaneous shots from this high-caliber Grineer rifle.

components.name: Fersteel Alloy
components.description:
Ferros that has been forged into a stronger metal.

Blueprint sold by Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus on Earth.

components.name: Grokdrul
components.description:
A noxious mix of polysaccharides and long-chain polymers, Grokdrul is a standard chemical used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth

components.name: Neural Sensors
components.description:
Implanted neural-link for controlling augmentations. Grineer design.

Location: Jupiter

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quatz and Kuva Quartakk’s burst fire mode not working when the shoot input is set to scrolling the mouse wheel.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed extreme fire rates with an unmodded Kuva Quartakk and the Quatz when using a rapid combination of mouse clicks.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to use your Secondary after aiming down sights of the Kuva Quartakk and swapping to their Secondary.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed being able to bypass the cooldown between scoped shots with the Kuva Quartakk and Quatz by scoping and unscoping between shots.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Prime Vault 26.0.8 + 26.0.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Kuva Quartakk now has force feedback sounds when aiming down its sights.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.1.0: TennoGen Round 13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an audio issue with the Quartakk becoming silent when rapid firing.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to Chat link the Towsun Weapon Skins for the Quartakk and Stubba.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quartakk firing sounds getting cut off.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Converted the Quartakk to a burst fire that fires all 4 rounds at the same time instead of a semi auto that fires 4 bullets per shot.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tactical Reload Mod not working on the Quartakk as a Client.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.8.0 + Hotfix 22.8.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Make a devastating entrance with the Maggor Assault Pack. Includes the Quartakk quad-barrelled assault rifle and hard-hitting Stubba submachinegun, with matching Maggor armor and syandana.
